mnemonics: C-L-O-U-D: Compute, Large-scale, On-demand, Ubiquitous, Distributed
keyPoints: Distributed computing involves multiple connected computers working together on a problem.
Cloud computing provides on-demand access to a shared pool of configurable computing resources.
Key characteristics include scalability, reliability, and cost-efficiency through virtualization.
commonMistakes: Assuming distributed computing and cloud computing are synonymous (cloud is a specific implementation of distributed computing).
Overlooking the importance of data consistency and latency issues in distributed systems.
